message:
feat(ftui): virtualized results list with O(visible) rendering (2noh9.3.4)

Replace manual per-row iteration with ftui VirtualizedList:
- ResultItem wrapper implements RenderItem with density-aware rendering
  (compact=1 line, cozy=2, spacious=3) and selection/queue indicators
- VirtualizedListState (RefCell for view-time mutation) manages scroll
  offset, selection, and viewport windowing for 100K+ item performance
- Selection/scroll messages (SelectionMoved, SelectionJumped, PageScrolled)
  now sync with VirtualizedListState for smooth keyboard navigation
- SearchCompleted resets scroll to top for fresh results
- Scrollbar auto-shown when items exceed viewport
- 4 new tests: density heights, selection sync, scroll reset, queue marks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
